title: North Korea Tests a New Missile Engine
summary: North Korea tested a new engine for missiles that could reach the United States. Their leader, Kim Jong Un, watched the test and said it makes their military stronger. The engine uses solid fuel, which makes missiles easier to move and hide. Some experts think North Korea might be exaggerating about how good the engine is because they did not share all the details. North Korea has been testing missiles for years, and this test is part of their plan to build more weapons. Other countries are watching closely because this could make it harder to stop missiles. The test shows North Korea is trying to improve its weapons, but we do not know exactly when or where it happened.

keywords.explanation: a weapon that flies through the air to hit a target far away
a part that makes something move, like in a car or missile
a type of fuel that is hard and makes missiles easier to launch quickly
an experiment to see if something works properly
people who know a lot about a topic and give their opinions

questions.question: Who watched the missile engine test in North Korea?
What type of fuel does the new engine use?
Why is solid fuel useful for missiles?
options: It makes missiles easier to move and hide
questions.correct_answer: It makes missiles easier to move and hide

questions.question: What do some experts think about North Korea's claim?
options: They think it might be an exaggeration
They think it is definitely true
They think it is a joke
questions.correct_answer: They think it might be an exaggeration

questions.question: What is North Korea trying to do with this test?
Did North Korea say exactly when the test happened?

background_read: North Korea is a country in Asia that has been testing missiles for many years. Missiles are weapons that can travel long distances to hit targets. An engine is what powers a missile to fly. Solid fuel is a type of fuel that is easier to use because it does not need to be filled up right before launching. Kim Jong Un is the leader of North Korea, and he wants to make his country's military stronger. Other countries, like the United States, are concerned because these missiles could reach faraway places. Experts are people who study these topics and help us understand what might be true or exaggerated.
Article_Structure: WHO: Kim Jong Un and North Korean scientists
WHAT: A test of a new solid-fuel engine for missiles
WHERE: North Korea (exact location not given)
WHY: To make North Korea's military stronger and improve weapons that could reach the U.S.

perspectives.description: They say the test is a big success that makes their military more powerful.
Some experts think North Korea might be exaggerating and not telling the whole truth.
